con:part.con:content: <definitions targetNamespace="urn:megaware:/mediate/ips/PC/PersonDocInfoService/PersonDocInfoService.wsdl" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:http="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/http/" xmlns:mime="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/mime/" xmlns:mw="http://www.mobicware.com" xmlns:s="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soap11="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:tns="urn:megaware:/mediate/ips/PC/PersonDocInfoService/PersonDocInfoService.wsdl" xmlns:wsa="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing"> <types> <s:schema targetNamespace="urn:megaware:/mediate/ips/PC/PersonDocInfoService/PersonDocInfoService.wsdl"> <s:element mw:isEncrypt="no" name="CEPRequest"> <s:complexType> <s:sequence> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" mw:tableName="" name="AuthInfo"> <s:complexType> <s:sequence> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="userSessionId" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="WS_ID" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="LE_ID" type="s:string"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> </s:element> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="Data" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="Signature" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="PublicCert" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="SignDate" type="s:string"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> </s:element> <s:element mw:isEncrypt="no" name="CEPResponse"> <s:complexType> <s:sequence> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="Result" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="Data" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="Comments" type="s:string"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> </s:element> </s:schema> </types> <message name="soapMsg_ReceiveInputMessage"> <part element="tns:CEPRequest" name="soapMsg_ReceiveInput"/> </message> <message name="soapMsg_ReceiveOutputMessage"> <part element="tns:CEPResponse" name="soapMsg_ReceiveOutput"/> </message> <portType name="PersonDocInfoServicePortType"> <operation name="soapMsg_Receive"> <input message="tns:soapMsg_ReceiveInputMessage" name="soapMsg_ReceiveInput"/> <output message="tns:soapMsg_ReceiveOutputMessage" name="soapMsg_ReceiveOutput"/> </operation> </portType> <binding name="PersonDocInfoServiceSOAP12Binding" type="tns:PersonDocInfoServicePortType"> <soap12:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="soapMsg_Receive"> <soap12:operation soapAction="/mediate/ips/PC/PersonDocInfoService" style="document"/> <input name="soapMsg_ReceiveInput"> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </input> <output name="soapMsg_ReceiveOutput"> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <binding name="PersonDocInfoServiceSOAP11Binding" type="tns:PersonDocInfoServicePortType"> <soap11:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="soapMsg_Receive"> <soap11:operation soapAction="/mediate/ips/PC/PersonDocInfoService" style="document"/> <input name="soapMsg_ReceiveInput"> <soap11:body use="literal"/> </input> <output name="soapMsg_ReceiveOutput"> <soap11:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <binding name="PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPGETBinding" type="tns:PersonDocInfoServicePortType"> <http:binding verb="GET"/> <operation name="soapMsg_Receive"> <http:operation location="/CEPRequest"/> <input name="soapMsg_ReceiveInput"> <http:urlEncoded/> </input> <output name="soapMsg_ReceiveOutput"> <mime:mimeXml part="Body"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <binding name="PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPPOSTXMLBinding" type="tns:PersonDocInfoServicePortType"> <http:binding verb="POST"/> <operation name="soapMsg_Receive"> <http:operation location="/CEPRequest"/> <input name="soapMsg_ReceiveInput"> <mime:content part="soapMsg_ReceiveInput" type="application/xml"/> </input> <output name="soapMsg_ReceiveOutput"> <mime:mimeXml part="Body"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <binding name="PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPPOSTFORMBinding" type="tns:PersonDocInfoServicePortType"> <http:binding verb="POST"/> <operation name="soapMsg_Receive"> <http:operation location="/CEPRequest"/> <input name="soapMsg_ReceiveInput"> <mime:content part="soapMsg_ReceiveInput" type="application/x-www-form-urlencoded"/> </input> <output name="soapMsg_ReceiveOutput"> <mime:mimeXml part="Body"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <binding name="PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPPOSTJSONBinding" type="tns:PersonDocInfoServicePortType"> <http:binding verb="POST"/> <operation name="soapMsg_Receive"> <http:operation location="/CEPRequest"/> <input name="soapMsg_ReceiveInput"> <mime:content part="soapMsg_ReceiveInput" type="application/json"/> </input> <output name="soapMsg_ReceiveOutput"> <mime:mimeXml part="Body"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <service name="PersonDocInfoServiceService"> <port binding="tns:PersonDocInfoServiceSOAP12Binding" name="PersonDocInfoServiceSOAP12BindingPort"> <soap12:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/PC/PersonDocInfoService"/> </port> <port binding="tns:PersonDocInfoServiceSOAP11Binding" name="PersonDocInfoServiceSOAP11BindingPort"> <soap11:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/PC/PersonDocInfoService"/> </port> <port binding="tns:PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPGETBinding" name="PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPGETBindingPort"> <http:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/PC/PersonDocInfoService"/> </port> <port binding="tns:PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPPOSTXMLBinding" name="PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPPOSTXMLBindingPort"> <http:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/PC/PersonDocInfoService"/> </port> <port binding="tns:PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPPOSTFORMBinding" name="PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPPOSTFORMBindingPort"> <http:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/PC/PersonDocInfoService"/> </port> <port binding="tns:PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPPOSTJSONBinding" name="PersonDocInfoServiceHTTPPOSTJSONBindingPort"> <http:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/PC/PersonDocInfoService"/> </port> </service> </definitions>

<definitions targetNamespace="urn:megaware:/mediate/ips/MOI/GetAddress/GetAddress.wsdl" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:http="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/http/" xmlns:mime="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/mime/" xmlns:mw="http://www.mobicware.com" xmlns:s="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soap11="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:tns="urn:megaware:/mediate/ips/MOI/GetAddress/GetAddress.wsdl" xmlns:wsa="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing"> <types> <s:schema targetNamespace="urn:megaware:/mediate/ips/MOI/GetAddress/GetAddress.wsdl"> <s:element mw:isEncrypt="no" name="Request"> <s:complexType> <s:sequence> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="Pin" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="Guid" type="s:string"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> </s:element> <s:element mw:isEncrypt="no" name="ResponseModel"> <s:complexType> <s:sequence> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pPinpp" type="s:long"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" mw:tableName="" name="pPermanentAddress"> <s:complexType> <s:sequence> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pCountry" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pRegion" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pDistrict" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pPlace" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pStreet" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pAddress" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pHouse" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pBlock" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pFlat" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:nillable="true" mw:preamble="" name="pRegdate" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:nillable="true" mw:preamble="" name="pRegtill" type="s:string"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> </s:element> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" mw:tableName="" name="pTemproaryAddress"> <s:complexType> <s:sequence> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pCountry" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:nillable="true" mw:preamble="" name="pRegion" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:nillable="true" mw:preamble="" name="pDistrict" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:nillable="true" mw:preamble="" name="pPlace" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:nillable="true" mw:preamble="" name="pStreet" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pHouse" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pFlat" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:nillable="true" mw:preamble="" name="pRegdate" type="s:string"/> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" </s:complexType> </s:element> <s:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" mw:column="" mw:delimiter="" mw:description="" mw:encoding="Plain" mw:function="" mw:isCondition="no" mw:isEncrypt="no" mw:length="0" mw:preamble="" name="pRequestGuid" type="s:string"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> </s:element> </s:schema> </types> <message name="receive1InputMessage"> <part element="tns:Request" name="receive1Input"/> </message> <message name="receive1OutputMessage"> <part element="tns:ResponseModel" name="receive1Output"/> </message> <portType name="GetAddressPortType"> <operation name="receive1"> <input message="tns:receive1InputMessage" name="receive1Input"/> <output message="tns:receive1OutputMessage" name="receive1Output"/> </operation> </portType> <binding name="GetAddressSOAP12Binding" type="tns:GetAddressPortType"> <soap12:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="receive1"> <soap12:operation soapAction="/mediate/ips/MOI/GetAddress" style="document"/> <input name="receive1Input"> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </input> <output name="receive1Output"> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <binding name="GetAddressSOAP11Binding" type="tns:GetAddressPortType"> <soap11:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="receive1"> <soap11:operation soapAction="/mediate/ips/MOI/GetAddress" style="document"/> <input name="receive1Input"> <soap11:body use="literal"/> </input> <output name="receive1Output"> <soap11:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <binding name="GetAddressHTTPGETBinding" type="tns:GetAddressPortType"> <http:binding verb="GET"/> <operation name="receive1"> <http:operation location="/Request"/> <input name="receive1Input"> <http:urlEncoded/> </input> <output name="receive1Output"> <mime:mimeXml part="Body"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <binding name="GetAddressHTTPPOSTXMLBinding" type="tns:GetAddressPortType"> <http:binding verb="POST"/> <operation name="receive1"> <http:operation location="/Request"/> <input name="receive1Input"> <mime:content part="receive1Input" type="application/xml"/> </input> <output name="receive1Output"> <mime:mimeXml part="Body"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <binding name="GetAddressHTTPPOSTFORMBinding" type="tns:GetAddressPortType"> <http:binding verb="POST"/> <operation name="receive1"> <http:operation location="/Request"/> <input name="receive1Input"> <mime:content part="receive1Input" type="application/x-www-form-urlencoded"/> </input> <output name="receive1Output"> <mime:mimeXml part="Body"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <binding name="GetAddressHTTPPOSTJSONBinding" type="tns:GetAddressPortType"> <http:binding verb="POST"/> <operation name="receive1"> <http:operation location="/Request"/> <input name="receive1Input"> <mime:content part="receive1Input" type="application/json"/> </input> <output name="receive1Output"> <mime:mimeXml part="Body"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <service name="GetAddressService"> <port binding="tns:GetAddressSOAP12Binding" name="GetAddressSOAP12BindingPort"> <soap12:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/MOI/GetAddress"/> </port> <port binding="tns:GetAddressSOAP11Binding" name="GetAddressSOAP11BindingPort"> <soap11:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/MOI/GetAddress"/> </port> <port binding="tns:GetAddressHTTPGETBinding" name="GetAddressHTTPGETBindingPort"> <http:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/MOI/GetAddress"/> </port> <port binding="tns:GetAddressHTTPPOSTXMLBinding" name="GetAddressHTTPPOSTXMLBindingPort"> <http:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/MOI/GetAddress"/> </port> <port binding="tns:GetAddressHTTPPOSTFORMBinding" name="GetAddressHTTPPOSTFORMBindingPort"> <http:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/MOI/GetAddress"/> </port> <port binding="tns:GetAddressHTTPPOSTJSONBinding" name="GetAddressHTTPPOSTJSONBindingPort"> <http:address location="https://ips.gov.uz:443/mediate/ips/MOI/GetAddress"/> </port> </service> </definitions>
